entries.summary: Completed Phase 1: Saleor Data Service. Implemented fetchRestaurants, fetchCategories, fetchDishes with proper error handling and fallback to mock data. Updated resolvers to use the service and pass restaurantId parameters. All tests pass.
lessons_learned: Proper error handling for malformed responses is crucial for service reliability.
Ensure that service function signatures match resolver expectations.
Testing both happy path and edge cases builds confidence in the implementation.
